Headline: Blue and Pink Line Service Delayed near Racine
ShortDescription: Blue and Pink Line trains are standing near Racine due to police activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue and Pink Line trains are standing near Racine due to police activity.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include: 
#7 Harrison
#8 Halsted
#126 Jackson
#60 Blue Island/26th

Shuttles buses have been requested in both directions for the following:

Blue Line from Grand to Forest Park to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Pink Line from Pulaski to Ashland to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
